features.name: overlay
features.trustedSource: Rust/local trusted evidence decides availability; JS only requests overlay evidence.
features.fallback: graceful no-Steam fallback disables overlay without failing local play.

trustedStatePolicy: Rust/local owns trusted state; JS, browser, Studio, Electron, and Steamworks surfaces are read-only and have no direct trusted writes.
boundary: Steamworks integration over the existing runtime; Rust/local owns trusted validation; JS/browser/Studio/Electron/Steamworks are read-only with no direct trusted writes; graceful no-Steam fallback is mandatory; Steam desktop is not Layer-3 cloud/mobile; Steam account/signing/Release button remain human/Ring-3.
